why: Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound minecraft:custom_click_action must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a custom-click-action body decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from UI behavior, command execution, interaction readiness, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_custom_click_action_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 8, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration serverbound packet id 0x08.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: Identifier.parse(String), CompoundTag.putString(String, String), ServerboundCustomClickActionPacket(Identifier, Optional<Tag>), ServerboundCustomClickActionPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ServerboundCustomClickActionPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), ServerboundCustomClickActionPacket.id(), ServerboundCustomClickActionPacket.payload(), Tag.getId(), Tag.getType(), and Tag.toString().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration serverbound custom_click_action dispatch.

Current Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound mapping contains client_information id 0x00, finish_configuration id 0x03, keep_alive id 0x04, pong id 0x05, resource_pack id 0x06, and select_known_packs id 0x07, but not custom_click_action id 0x08.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x8 in Serverbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration serverbound custom_click_action packet id 8
